title: American History for Young Learners
description: An interactive class exploring key events and figures in American History through engaging activities and discussions.
syllabus: Weekly modules covering Colonial America, The American Revolution, Civil War, World Wars, and Modern America.

title: Introduction to Coding for Kids
description: A fun beginner-friendly class teaching the basics of programming through games and interactive projects.
syllabus: Introduction to coding concepts, variables, loops, conditionals, and creating simple games.

title: Creative Writing Workshop
description: Develop storytelling skills and unleash creativity through guided writing exercises and collaborative projects.
syllabus: Character development, plot structure, setting, dialogue, and completing a short story.
